title: catalogue.scored (v1)
description: Published by the Catalogue Service when the nightly scoring job completes. Carries aggregate scoring statistics. See TDD Sections 3.2.1, 5.6.

run_id.description: Unique identifier for this scoring run.

sku_count.description: Total number of SKUs scored in this run.

high_opportunity_count.description: Number of SKUs that qualified as high opportunity.

duration_ms.description: Wall-clock duration of the scoring run in milliseconds.

triggered_at.description: Scheduled time that triggered this run.
